Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Chaos Remnant
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +15% (augmented)
Pack Size: +26% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +48% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +105% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Profane" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 15(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Chaos
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 12(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 239(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +22(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
17(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Thunderous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Lightning
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
22(20-25)% more Monster Life
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
